title: Query default routing and ready alias
description:
Make a bare query and the natural ready alias work instead of erroring.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-04: A bare jit query returns all issues via the existing query-all path, jit query ready is accepted as an alias of available, and the existing --state/--assignee/--priority/--label filters work unchanged on that default path with no new traversal semantic.
